title: John Walker (programmer)
body: John Wallace Walker (May 16, 1949 – February 2, 2024) was an American computer programmer, author and co-founder of the computer-aided design software company Autodesk. He was later recognized for his writing on his website Fourmilab.
categories: Articles with unsourced statements from August 2014
